message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: The root access key will be set to Inactive. You can re-enable it later if needed. This is the safest first step.

blocked_reasons: IAM.4 execution is handled exclusively by /api/root-key-remediation-runs.
resolution.decision_rationale: IAM.4 strategy 'iam_root_key_disable' is exposed here as metadata only. Use /api/root-key-remediation-runs for root-key lifecycle execution.
